item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response fires the anti-spiral brake immediately, refusing the requested new gate channel as the default local repair. It recognizes the repeated pattern of queue/ownership/entry splits across the prior cases, moves the next action upstream to unified intake/routing governance with ownership, escalation, and capacity responsibility, and does not provide an actionable new channel or queue implementation."}
